user_query: I'm planning a hiking trip with my friends and need to check the weather conditions. Can you provide the hourly forecast for the next 48 hours at the coordinates 40.7128° N, 74.0060° W? Additionally, suggest some nearby hotels for accommodation.

TaskList.description: Fetch the hourly weather forecast for the next 48 hours at the specified coordinates (40.7128° N, 74.0060° W).
Search for nearby hotels based on the provided coordinates.
